assertions.assertion: Output contains 'AddBff()' with '.ConfigureOpenIdConnect' replacing the manual AddAuthentication/AddCookie/AddOpenIdConnect setup

assertions.rationale: MapBffManagementEndpoints is removed — noted as auto-registered in v4

assertions.assertion: Output contains '.AddRemoteApis()' since V4 requires it for remote API endpoints
Output preserves the original OIDC settings (Authority, ClientId, ClientSecret, ResponseType, scopes)
assertions.rationale: All original settings preserved: Authority, ClientId, ClientSecret, ResponseType=code, api1 scope
